At the center stands a barefoot ascetic female figure, sensual yet solemn, her presence monumental but restrained, wearing flowing sculptural fabric that reveals shoulders and clavicles without vulgarity, her skin subtly sculpted by directional light. The visual atmosphere must remain architectural, balanced, and mid-frame monumental, preserving clean geometric lines and controlled negative space, with subtle analog-like interference in shadows and metal edges, never digital chaos, never colorful cyberpunk, but restrained brutalist sacred silence infused with Void presence.
